pageTitle: Place the important words before they become urgent
pageDescription: The item library is the only editing source; overview, delivery map, relationship expression, and trust boundaries are derived views.

toast.deletePendingItem: Queued for deletion: {{title}}. You can undo within 5 seconds.
toast.deleteFailedItem: Failed to delete life organizing item

metrics.totalDesc: The item library is the only data source.
metrics.criticalDraftDesc: Check what is still draft or continuously updated.
metrics.missingDeliveryDesc: Future or conditional visibility needs a trigger description.
metrics.finalLockedDesc: Locked content needs deliberate confirmation before edits.
metrics.heavyLoadDesc: Best opened when there is enough steadiness.
metrics.aiExcludedDesc: These items stay out of cross-module insight.
metrics.secondConfirmDesc: A gentle pause remains before opening.

overview.title: Life Organizing Overview
overview.description: See coverage, gaps, and boundaries without turning heavy content into pressure.
overview.coverageDesc: Check whether the work is overly concentrated in one category.
overview.boundaryDesc: Only counts and cues are shown here; private content is not auto-summarized.
overview.recentDesc: Only summaries and boundaries are shown, not full content.
overview.emotionalLoadDesc: Emotional load is not a main category; it is an opening cue per item.
overview.reviewPromptsDesc: Organize slowly without turning this into completion pressure.
overview.missingDeliveryCopy: These can remain drafts, but final versions need clear trigger and verification wording.

items.title: Item Library
items.selectPrompt: Select an item to view details.
items.secondConfirmCopy: This item requires a second confirmation, so only its summary is shown first.

edit.lockedCopy: This item is locked. Unlock it before editing.

validation.required: Please fill in title, summary, and content
validation.criticalFinalDelivery: Critical final items need a delivery condition

deliveryMap.title: Delivery Map
deliveryMap.description: Check who sees what by recipient and visibility.
deliveryMap.groupDescription: V1 records delivery intent and manual confirmation conditions only. It does not promise automatic delivery.
deliveryMap.checklistDesc: These checks come from item fields and do not create separate data.

relationship.title: Relationship Expression
relationship.description: Focus on words for someone and unfinished concerns tied to relationships.
relationship.now: Words that can be said now
relationship.nowDesc: These may move into the relationship module later, but nothing is pushed automatically.
relationship.future: Words for future or after death
relationship.futureDesc: Keep delivery intent, recipient, and condition beside the text.
relationship.privateDesc: These should not be pushed automatically or enter AI summaries by default.
relationship.unlinkedDesc: You can decide later whether to reference a relationship record.
relationship.nowHint: visibility=now is only a cue that expression is possible; it is not a nudge or automatic copy.

boundaries.title: Trust Boundaries
boundaries.description: Make system boundaries explicit and gather item-level protection rules in one view.
boundaries.rulesDesc: These notes come from backend configuration and are maintained separately from item rules.
boundaries.legalCopy: Life Organizing has no legal will effect and does not replace insurance, asset, medical, or legal document management.

empty.filteredItems: No life organizing items match the current filters.
